---
title: "Blog"
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
image-alt: "Profile picture of Mickaël CANOUIL"
subtitle: '*[{{< iconify octicon:rss-16 title="RSS" label="RSS" >}} RSS Feed](blog.xml)*'
# margin-header: '*[{{< iconify octicon:rss-16 title="RSS" label="RSS" >}} RSS Feed](blog.xml)*'
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: assets/listing-templates/blog.ejs.md
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 6
  feed:
    language: en-gb
---
